accessNotes.en: Gia touristes i praktiki prosvasi einai kyrios me kaiki i thalassio taxi apo tin Ydra. Yparchei kai megalo perpatima, opote den theoreitai eykoli odiki prosvasi.

sourceNotes: Source-backed Hydra pass 2026-05-28: AllOverGreece and HydraDirect support Agios Nikolaos as a Hydra pebble beach reached by sea transport, with seasonal sunbeds/umbrellas and limited services. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

High-confidence Hydra follow-up 2026-06-02: AllOverGreece, HydraDirect and BeachSearcher support Agios Nikolaos as a Hydra pebble beach mainly reached by sea transport, with seasonal services. The access copy was changed from absolute boat-only wording to mostly sea-transport wording because walking access is also reported but long. No windProfile, scoring, live calm/protected/safe, or ideal-beach claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Hydra official bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: official Avlaki bathing profile supports identity, location west of Hydra port, walking-path and concrete-step access, pebble/rock shore and seabed, concrete platforms over rocks, metal ladders, unorganized status with limited waste baskets, normal first-meter depth with steep seabed slope, and nearby settlement services. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, or live-condition claim was added.

Popular confidence pass 2026-06-02 H: existing official or direct local beach sources support the recorded static identity, access, terrain, depth/service context for this record. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; windProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

accessNotes.en: Ta Kaminia vriskontai dipla ston omonymo oikismo, peripou 20 lepta me paraliako perpatima apo ti Chora tis Ydras i grigora me thalassio taxi. I pigi stirizei eleytheri prosvasi, xaplostres pros enoikiasi kai epiloges fagitoy ston oikismo.
accessNotes.gr: Τα Καμίνια βρίσκονται δίπλα στον ομώνυμο οικισμό, περίπου 20 λεπτά με παραλιακό περπάτημα από τη Χώρα της Ύδρας ή γρήγορα με θαλάσσιο ταξί. Η πηγή στηρίζει ελεύθερη πρόσβαση, ξαπλώστρες προς ενοικίαση και επιλογές φαγητού στον οικισμό.

accessNotes.gr: Οι Πλάκες Βλυχού βρίσκονται κοντά στον οικισμό Βλυχός. Η πηγή στηρίζει πρόσβαση με σύντομο περπάτημα από τον Βλυχό ή θαλάσσιο ταξί από το λιμάνι της Ύδρας, βοτσαλωτή ακτή και επιλογές φαγητού/διαμονής στην περιοχή.
accessNotes.fr: Oi Plakes Vlychoy vriskontai konta ston oikismo Vlychos. I pigi stirizei prosvasi me syntomo perpatima apo ton Vlycho i thalassio taxi apo to limani tis Ydras, votsaloti akti kai epiloges fagitoy/diamonis stin periochi.

waterDepth.label: Βαθιά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Το βάθος συνήθως ανεβαίνει πιο γρήγορα μετά την είσοδο στη θάλασσα.

sourceNotes: Hydra direct source cleanup 2026-05-29: Athens Attica supports Plakes Vlyhou as a Hydra beach area near Vlyhos, with pebble shoreline, short walk from Vlyhos, sea-taxi access from Hydra port, and nearby dining/accommodation. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, or live-condition claim was added.

Island confidence pass 2026-06-05: Hydra records promoted to high for static beach facts only. Existing direct Athens Attica, AllOverGreece and Hydra local source notes support identity/location plus recorded access, terrain and service context. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.
